creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
I know this is not the "normal" way (it will be a separate PR)
But it also fails with DOCS=on.

d: /ram/usr/ports/databases/ruby-bdb/work/bdb-0.6.6/docs/doc: No such file or directory

The error seems here:

79   (cd ${WRKSRC}/docs/doc && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . {STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/doc)
                        ^^^                                                                  
if I change it to:  
79   (cd ${WRKSRC}/docs && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}/doc)
it works.
